title: Simple Stations - Farmer
description: Mod for configurable, compact and simple farming stations
body:
**Simple Stations** mod provides you structures which can be used to automate single crop farming.  
Station works according to the selected filter (seed or crop) which is not consumed.   
This mod is made to help in industrial mod packs.

*   **Farming station:** carrot, potato, melon, pumpkin, beet, wheat
*   **Mycology station:** red mushroom, brown mushroom, nether wart, chorus
*   **Woodcutting station:** acacia, bamboo, birch, cherry, dark oak, jungle, mangrove, oak, spruce, warped and crimson stem
*   **Foraging station:** apple, cocoa, sugar cane, cactus, flowers, sweet and glow berries

### Requirements

1.  For stable work you need water only - 1 bucket per cycle
2.  One cycle takes 20 realtime minutes and produces a big batch of crops at the end  
    Work time can be shortened  
    with power (redstone or RF) to 8.3 minutes  
    with fertilizer (bone meal) to 4 minutes  
    with both to 2.5 minutes
3.  Stations needs a single seed to start batch producing
4.  Structure takes 3x3x1 space.

### Features

*   Supports RF energy 
*   Configurable settings 
*   JEI compatibility
*   Supports fluid and item tubes
